title: For the One Who Has No One
scripture_text: God settles the solitary in a home; he leads out the prisoners to prosperity.
reflection: The single most repeated promise in the Bible is "I will be with you." The loneliness is not the end of the story.
body:
You are alone tonight. Maybe not by circumstance. Maybe by choice. Maybe by a long chain of choices that you are not proud of, or a long chain of things that were done to you that you did not deserve.

It does not matter how you got here. You are here.

The Lord is here with you. He is closer than the chair you are sitting in. He has always been closer than the loneliness would let you believe.

You are not too far gone. You are not too old. You are not too broken. He is the God who settles the lonely in a home. He has a place for you. The place is Him.

Wait for Him. He is coming. He is already here.
prayer: Lord, I am alone. Be with me. Speak to me. Let me feel You. Amen.
